$:/plugins/bj/tiddlyprism/readme.text:
This plugin provides source code hightlighting, using the prismjs library: https://github.com/PrismJS/prism version 1.29.0

The plugin includes the rules for highlighting css, html, javascript and other 'c' like languages, it also contains additional rules for tiddywiki markup.

The rules for other languages are dynamically loaded from the internet, see https://prismjs.com/#supported-languages. Nearly 300 are supported.
$:/plugins/bj/tiddlyprism/readme.title: $:/plugins/bj/tiddlyprism/readme
